scripts.build: wp-scripts build && npm run build:scss && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.minify:css: sass src/style.scss build/ace-carousel-styles.css --style=compressed && cp build/ace-carousel-styles.css build/ace-carousel-styles.min.css
scripts.minify:js: terser build/index.js -o build/index.js --compress --mangle && terser build/frontend.js -o build/frontend.js --compress --mangle
